FLOW.COMMENT: fwAdvanceWorkflowStep - advance the workflow's current step to its next step

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: z_advanceWorkflowToNextStep - advance the workflow's current step to its next step by incrementing the step number by 1

MAP.COMMENT: SELECT CURRENT_WORKFLOW_STEP FROM TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE WHERE TRANSACTION_ID='%sFwTransactionid%'

Values.value: SELECT CURRENT_WORKFLOW_STEP FROM TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE WHERE TRANSACTION_ID='%sFwTransactionid%'
